# USAgentLeads

> USAgentLeads is a verified real estate agent contact database covering all 50 US states. It provides 888,809+ agent contacts with name, email, phone, and state — available as instant CSV downloads or via REST API.

## Company Overview

USAgentLeads is a B2B data provider specializing in real estate agent contact information. The database is compiled from public sources including state licensing records, MLS listings, Zillow, Realtor.com, and major brokerage sites, then verified for accuracy. The dataset is refreshed on a regular cycle (current dataset: July 2026). The company serves coaches, SaaS/PropTech companies, mortgage lenders, marketing agencies, brokerages, lead generation companies, home services businesses, insurance agencies, real estate photographers, and moving companies that need to reach licensed real estate professionals.

- Website: https://www.usagentleads.com
- Support: support@beelodev.com
- Industry: B2B data / real estate technology
- Coverage: All 50 US states
- Total contacts: 888,809+
- Data fields: Full name, email address, phone number, state
- Data format: CSV (download) or JSON (API)
- Deliverability rate: 90%+
- Phone coverage: roughly 40% of records include a direct phone number
- Guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee on all purchases
- Not affiliated with NAR or any MLS

## Products & Pricing

### State Pack — $49/state (one-time)
Download a single state's real estate agent contact list as a CSV file. Instant delivery, guest checkout (no account required). Available for all 50 states.

### Full Database — $199 (one-time)
All 50 states, 888,809+ contacts in a single CSV download. One-time purchase, no subscription. At 4+ states this beats stacking state packs.

### Pro Dashboard — $49/month
Searchable web interface to browse, filter, and search all 888,809+ agents by state, name, or email. No CSV download — designed for teams that need a live searchable interface. Cancel anytime.

### Pro API — $79/month
REST API access to query the full database programmatically. Supports state filtering, search, and paginated JSON responses. Includes 10,000 requests/month.

### Free Sample
A free 500-contact sample CSV is available on the homepage to evaluate data quality before purchasing. No account or credit card required.

## Glossary

Key terms defined: MLS, IDX, NAR, Realtor vs Real Estate Agent, Brokerage, Commission Split, CRM, Cold Email, CAN-SPAM, Real Estate Lead, Email List, CSV.

Browse all: https://www.usagentleads.com/glossary

## API Overview

The USAgentLeads REST API provides programmatic access to the full agent database.

- Base URL: https://www.usagentleads.com/api/v1
- Authentication: API key via X-API-Key header
- Endpoints: GET /agents (list/search/filter agents), GET /agents/:id (single agent)
- Filtering: by state (two-letter code), search by name/email
- Response format: JSON with pagination
- Rate limit: 10,000 requests/month (Pro API plan)
- Full docs: https://www.usagentleads.com/docs

## Data Quality

- Compiled from public sources: state licensing records, MLS listings, Zillow, Realtor.com, and major brokerage sites
- 90%+ email deliverability rate
- Refreshed on a regular cycle (current dataset: July 2026), with cleanup passes for duplicates and malformed records
- Each record includes: full name, verified email, phone number (where available), US state
- Free 500-contact sample available for quality evaluation
